1.content: Welcome to the Loud House Giantess Interactive! Now let's get the ball rolling. I've always liked the Loud House and the Casagrandes and how the characters are designed. So I thought it would be fun to get a bug's eye view of the girls and how they look from a tiny perspective. How will this story begin?
1.title: Let's Get Started!

11.content: So which boy will shrink to tiny size?
11.title: Single shrinking (Male).

111.content: In this story path, our white-haired hero, Lincoln Loud, ends up shrunken to the size of an ant around one of the ladies in his home of Royal Woods, Michigan. With Lincoln tiny, he can be around any of the girls in his home town. The giantess characters in this story include his many sisters and mother, along with their classmates, friends, or any other background characters. So which girl does Lincoln become tiny around?
111.title: Lincoln Loud.

1111.content: Which member of the Loud family is Lincoln tiny around? His sisters or his mother, Rita Loud?
1111.title: The Loud family.

11112.content: Lori, Leni, Luna, Luan, or Lynn Loud.
11112.title: Older Loud sisters.

11113.content: Lucy, Lana, Lola, or Lisa.
11113.title: Younger Loud sisters.

1112.content: Lincoln could also be shrunken around some of the Loud family's female friends, classmates, or other acquaintances. Going up in birth order: First there is Lisa's new best friend from kindergarten, Darcy Helmandolloar, or maybe Lola's friend Roxanne.
1112.title: Friends of the main characters.

11121.content:
It was another day at Royal Woods Elementary School. The white-haired sole brother of the Loud family was walking down the halls to his class with none other than his best friend, Clyde McBride. They were in their seats as Ms. Johnson's class began and just watched the time go by. For anyone else, this would just be a normal, peaceful, and totally uneventful day, but for Lincoln Loud, that clearly wasn't the case.

What Lincoln didn't know was that at midnight the night before the school day started, Lincoln's young genius of a sister, Lisa, snuck into his room and decided to test one of her experiments on him. It was a small pill that was green on one side and yellow on the other and gave off a mysterious green glow. "Dear male sibling, I hope you don't hold this experiment against me," Lisa said as she dropped the glowing pill into Lincoln's open mouth and made sure he swallowed it without choking.

A little bit after class, Lincoln and Clyde were walking through the hallway when Lincoln started feeling dizzy and weak. "Whoa, what's going on?" Lincoln asked. Clyde put a hand on his shoulder to help him stay up. "Hey Lincoln, are you feeling okay?" his friend asked in concern. "Yeah, I think so. I'm just gonna use the bathroom, Clyde. No worries."

Lincoln walked over to the bathroom and splashed water from the sink on his face. "Ugh, suddenly I don't feel like myself," he said, looking at his reflection in the mirror. Lincoln was about to walk out when all of a sudden, dizziness went away and he had a strange feeling building up inside. It was unreal to him but it looked like his body was emanating a green aura out of nowhere and before he knew it, the whole room started growing around him.

"Hey, what's happening to me?!" he yelled. Lincoln's screams went unheard as the bathroom kept expanding before his eyes. When it finally ended, the glowing stopped, and everything looked gigantic to him. The ceiling looked like it was miles above him and he had to crane his neck up at 90 degrees just to see it. The sink and toilets in the stalls looked like big buildings to him now. He was flabbergasted as everything looked so different to him now.

"What's going on here? Is that the sink and are those the toilets that I just saw?" he asked looking around. "Why is everything so big?" Lincoln tried to keep his cool in this situation, but it was difficult for him to believe that everything just grew so huge out of nowhere until he realized what actually happened. "Wait a minute. The room didn't grow. Somehow...I Shrank!" he exclaimed. Lincoln was shocked to find out that he just suddenly shrunk to a tiny size. He estimated that he was about 1 inch tall.

Lincoln had no idea how this happened to him but he knew he needed help to undo it. "I've gotta get out of here and find help. Maybe if I find Lisa she'll..." Lincoln's train of thought stopped at the mention of his genius sister's name and that's when the realization hit him. "Lisa! She must have something to do with this," he said as his expression changed from shocked too angry. "If she's responsible for reducing my size, I'm gonna test one of her crazy experiments on her."

Lincoln tried to walk out of the bathroom to go find his intelligent sister. Luckily for him, the door was kept open by a door wedge. He went around the wedge and found himself back in the hallway.

"Yeah, I'll give Lisa a taste of her own medicine. That's what I'll do," he said. However, once the miniaturized boy got back into the hallway of his school, he quickly realized the challenge in front of him and had his anger at his younger sister replaced with a realization of his current predicament. "But first I'll have to get through this hallway of gigantic, normal-sized kids," he said, backing up against the wall and watching as all of his fellow students walked across the hallway. They were all towering above him which made him feel like a puny insect that they could accidentally crush if he wasn't careful.

All of the kids in the hallway towered over Lincoln like moving skyscrapers, and he was way too scared to move from his current position. "Oh man. This won't be easy. I must look like a helpless bug to everyone here now. If I go out there, they could squish me and won't even know it." Every step those kids made was like a giant earthquake to the shrunken boy and Lincoln felt the ground below him shake as every foot made contact with the ground, creating an earth-shattering, booming noise that made Lincoln cover his little ears.

At his current height, the voices from all of the students were loud enough to make Lincoln's eardrums bleed. "Maybe I should just wait until everybody goes back to class and then I'll find Lisa?" Lincoln said with a nervous smile. But then he thought about it and realized that would take too long and somebody could still walk in his path, accidentally squishing him. "No! I can't wait until then. I've got to get to Lisa," Lincoln said with his newfound confidence. "I've got to reach her kindergarten class. Maybe if I find one of my friends, they can help me."

Lincoln decided it was time to move from the wall and find help to get back to normal. He thought that, maybe, if he spots one of his friends, they could help him get to Lisa and fix this mess. Unfortunately, he couldn't see any of his friends anywhere and just decided to go with whoever he can find. "Well, I guess I'd better get moving," Lincoln said.

He started running around the hallway, staying close to the lockers to avoid the passing giant students in the middle of the halls. "Whew, this isn't so hard. It's like walking along the sidewalk and avoiding traffic." Lincoln was still running and realized that he barely moved too far from the bathroom. But that didn't stop him from his goal. He kept on going, avoiding any shoes that would've crushed him into extinction.

All of the normal-sized kids in the halls were either walking around or just chatting with each other, completely oblivious of the tiny boy running by their feet like a scurrying bug. Lincoln just kept running around the halls until he started getting tired, and eventually, ran out of steam. "Oh man, *pant pant* I'm so exhausted and there's still a long way's to go. I guess this is what insects in the halls have to go through," he said as he stopped close to the wall to catch his breath.

However, Lincoln's quick breather was cut short when a large shadow engulfed him and his surroundings. He looked up and what he saw immediately put a frown on his little face, "Oh come on!" Lincoln saw someone lift their foot up and quickly panicked as soon as he saw that person's shoe coming down to step on him. With all the strength he had left, the little Lincoln turned around in the opposite direction to avoid getting squished.

He looked back just for a second and tried to run faster when he saw the colossal footwear slowly approaching him. "Ahhh! Oh no. I am not gonna get squished today!" Lincoln screamed as he made a big leap to get far away just as the shoe finally hit the floor. Tumbling away as the foot made an impact onto the floor, Lincoln managed to avoid getting stepped on in the nick of time. "Whew, that was close."

He then turned around to get moving again, but then he noticed the shoe and looked up at who was wearing it. And to his relief, it was a girl that he knew from his school. With his hope restored, Lincoln decided to get this girl's attention to get back to normal size.

Who was the girl that Lincoln was in front of? Was it one of his younger sisters or another girl from his school?
11121.title: Elementary school (Unaware version).

111212.content: Let's start with some of the girls Lincoln's age.
111212.title: Other girls.

choices: Stella noticed Lincoln on the floor.
1112122.content:
Lincoln recognized the giant shoe in front of him. It was green and he knew only one person with a shoe like that. A smile became known on Lincoln's face as he looked up and saw the person wearing it was none other than his friend, Stella. "Stella! Oh, thank goodness. I'm saved," he said in relief.

Lincoln believed that Stella was a good person, and considering that she's a really good friend of his, she would definitely help him out of 'little' predicament. But first, he had to get her attention, which wouldn't be easy thanks to the difference in their size. Lincoln looked up at her and knew that Stella was only a few inches taller than him and all of his friends, so compared to what they would look like at his current state, Stella looked as tall as the Empire State building.

Regardless, he knew that she was his only hope if he wanted to get back to normal. "Hey Stella, down here!" he shouted to her, but to no avail. He just kept it up until he got tired. "Oh, it's no use. She can't hear me. My voice is too small." "I'll see you guys at lunch okay," she said, which to Lincoln was so loud that he had to cover his ears.

"I've got to find a way to get her to notice me. But how?" Lincoln pondered. However, he didn't have time to think as he saw Stella about to lift her foot again and leave. "Oh no!" Lincoln wasn't going to let her get away so he climbed onto her shoe as it rose and held on for dear life as Stella resumed her walk. "Whoa! take it easy Stella!" he shouted to her, which fell on deaf ears.

Lincoln tried to keep his grip on Stella's green shoe as best he could, but her constant movements didn't make it easy. He felt like he was on a roller coaster as he felt the rise and fall of Stella's left foot as she walked to wherever she was going. Lincoln was about to lose his grip and fall off when he spotted her shoelaces and quickly knew what to do. A shoelace was swinging and to keep from falling off, Lincoln quickly latched onto it. However, that only made the ride worse as the shoelace kept swinging back and forth with Stella's every step.

"I can't wait until this over. And I hope that happens pretty soon." he groaned, starting to feel like he was getting motion sick from the shoelace swinging around. Fortunately, the ride was over as Stella came to a stop right in front of her locker. "Finally, now maybe I can get her attention?" he said. Lincoln let go of the giant shoelace and landed safely on the floor just as Stella opened her locker. And to his joy, she got down on one knee and put her backpack on the floor to get her stuff out of her locker.

With Stella's head closer to the floor, Lincoln felt it was the perfect time to get her attention. He ran in front of her and tried to call to her again, "I hope this works. Hey, Stella! STELLA! DOWN HERE!" he shouted to her while jumping and waving his arms. At first it didn't seem to work but Lincoln didn't give up as she was currently the only one who could help him. "STELLA! IT'S ME LINCOLN! HELP!" he shouted some more and wouldn't stop trying until it worked.

Did Stella notice Lincoln or not?
1112122.title: Stella.

choices: Climb into her lunch bag (vore story).
11121222.content:
Lincoln still tried and tried to get Stella to hear him, but unfortunately, it just wasn't enough. Stella still couldn't hear a word he said no matter how loud he screamed to her. "Oh man, come on Stella!" he said in annoyance. "I've gotta find another way to get her attention. But how?" he said.

Lincoln looked around him and thought of other ways to get Stella to see him. She was still getting her things that she needed from her locker but she was almost done, which made Lincoln desperate as he didn't have a lot of time before she got up again. And right now, the last thing he wanted was to hitch a rising and falling ride on her shoe again.

The tiny Loud looked around stressfully and then thought of a few other ways to get Stella to find him. First, he thought he could just climb up her body and reach her ear to get her attention. His other options were to hop into her backpack or even her lunch bag if he was really that desperate. With Stella about to get up, Lincoln had no choice but to pick something and stick with it.

What will the bug-sized Loud do?
1. Climb Stella - giantess body exploration.
2. Get into her backpack.
3. Climb into her lunch bag - vore story.
11121222.title: Stella didn't notice Lincoln.

1121.content:
It was a normal day in Royal Woods, Michigan. Clyde was on his way to the Loud family's house to watch the newest episode of his favorite TV show, "ARGGH!" with his best friend Lincoln.

Meanwhile, a certain four-year-old genius was up in her room working on her newest creation.
It was a machine capable of reducing organic and inorganic material to minuscule sizes. She named it the "Matter Reduction Ray".
Lisa smiled as she placed a small apple on top of a stool. If everything goes as planned, the apple would be reduced to a fraction of its original size. Lisa put on her safety goggles and turned on the machine.
A powerful blue beam of light struck the apple. It was reduced in size almost instantly. Lisa squealed with excitement and rubbed her hands together, happy with her accomplishment.
Suddenly sparks started to fly from the machine as it started to overheat. Smoke started to come out from the machine as it spun around.
"That can't be good," Lisa said.
The machine continued to spin around as it shrunk Lisa's bed and many other items on her desk, down to a minuscule size. The smoke started to clear and the machine wired down. Lisa peeked out from under the crib. She was relieved to see that nothing important was shrunk.


Unbeknownst to Lisa, the ray had shot a beam out her open window. From there the beam traveled across the street and bounced off the neighbor's front window.


The beam was now headed straight for Clyde who had just rung the doorbell of the Loud's house.
Clyde yelped as he was engulfed by a bright blue light. He dwindled in size until he was an inch tall.
The tiny boy groaned as he picked himself up off the ground.
"What just happened?" Clyde asked himself.
Clyde looked up and his eyes widen in surprise. In front of him was the Loud's front door, only it was a hundred feet tall.
"I've been shrunk!" Clyde said starting to panic.

He took off his glasses and pulled a small handkerchief out of his pocket and wiped the lenses before putting them back on.

"No, I'm not seeing things!" Clyde said putting his hands on his head. "I've definitely been shrunk!"

The massive door swung open and Clyde looked up at the gigantic figure before him.

It was...
1121.title: The Loud House

info.brief_description: Characters from the Loud House/Casagrandes either shrink or grow in size. Please ADD.
info.description:
This is my first interactive so I hope it goes well. I like shrinking and giantess material. In this story, characters from Nickelodeon's "The Loud House" and "The Casagrandes" get shrunken down to tiny size or grow gigantic. They have micro adventures anywhere in the show's universe.

Look here to see any of their designs along with the background characters:
https://theloudhouse.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Females

Rules:
1. Shrinking males and females are allowed. Minimum Shrinking size = 1 inch
2. Giantess only, NO giant males.
3. Interaction is F/F or F/M only.
4. Please use proper grammar and spelling.
5. Characters can be shrunken around any girl in the shows.
6. Keep the giantesses unaware for the most part until stated otherwise.
7. Giantesses can be aware from the start as well.
8. Characters are indestructible and cannot die.
9. No one sentence chapters, unless it's an important choice.
10. Do not end the story too soon.

ALLOWED:
1. Stomping on shrunken characters.
2. Soft Vore only.
3. Any body entrance is fine (Mouth, Ears, or Nose).
4. Endosomatophilia (traveling through giantess bodies).
5. Unaware giantess.
6. In between breasts.
7. Hair forest (Hair on head not in private area).
8. Gentle Giantess.
9. Romance with F/M.

NOT ALLOWED:
1. Blood and Gore.
2. Scat.
3. Sex.
4. Toilet stuff.
5. Hard Vore.
6. Character deaths.
7. Anal sex.

Feel free to add in any other characters that aren't on the list. Enjoy!
